metadata.description: Data analytics tools for Claude — statistical analysis, machine learning, forecasting, and more. Upload your data, ask a question, get an interactive report.

plugins.name: mcp-analytics
plugins.description: Upload CSV files or connect Shopify, Stripe, WooCommerce, and more. Run 100+ analysis types — regression, clustering, forecasting, A/B tests, churn prediction — and get interactive HTML reports with charts and AI insights.
